description.s: Designated zones designed to keep traffic apart - "roads" in the water.
Sailing boats must not impede the progress of a large vessel using the TSS. Avoid by as wide a margin as possible. If we need to cross, do so at right angles to the flow.
allowed in TSS, but the boats must not impede vessels using the channels.
Exemptions to these rules for vessels carrying out maintenance work or laying cables.
